product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya Rectangle Trinket Plate - Marble Home Decor Accessory for Jewellery & Keys
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian adults, predominantly working professionals and homemakers aged 25-45
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Organizing small items such as jewellery, keys, coins, and decorative trinkets
secondary_use_cases: Serving dry snacks or sweets during festivals or gatherings
Decorative centrepiece for coffee tables or study desks
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for festivals like Diwali, Raksha Bandhan, and housewarming gifts in Indian households

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Marble is traditionally valued in Indian decor for its elegance and durability, making it ideal for gifting and festive use
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Placed in home entryways, dressing tables, pooja rooms, or office desks to hold small essential items and showpieces
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Blending minimalistic modern lifestyle with traditional Indian aesthetic, emphasizing neatness and style
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Offers a sense of organized calm and elevates home decor with a premium, heritage-inspired accessory

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Rectangle Trinket Plate - Premium White Marble with Gold Accent Legs - Home & Lifestyle Decorative Organizer
bullet_points: Elegant White Marble Tray: Smooth, polished surface with natural veins for a stylish look
Compact Rectangle Shape: Perfect size to organize jewellery, keys, or small valuables
Premium Gold Accent Feet: Adds a touch of luxury while elevating the tray off surfaces
Versatile Use: Ideal for entryways, dressing tables, pooja rooms, or gifting during festivals
Easy to Clean & Durable: Natural stone with sturdy design to last through everyday use
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Enhance your home decor with the Tatsya Rectangle Trinket Plate, crafted from premium white marble and elevated by gold-tone spherical feet. This decorative tray is perfect for organizing your everyday essentials like jewellery and keys, while adding a sophisticated touch to any Indian home environment.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Close-up visuals showcasing marble texture and gold feet craftsmanship
Lifestyle image with tray holding bangles, keys, and coins on a dressing table
Festive setting with dry sweets and diyas placed on the tray
Comparison chart highlighting durability and elegance versus plastic trays
Storytelling module on the artisanal marble craftsmanship and brand heritage

decorative marble tray for jewellery and keys in Indian homes
multipurpose marble tray for home decor and gifting
elegant small marble plates for pooja and dressing table

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Tray shape, white marble color with natural veining, and gold spherical feet must remain unchanged and clearly visible
recommended_image_angles: 45-degree angled shot showing tray surface and feet
Top-down view highlighting marble texture and shape
Close-up focus on gold feet for premium detail
Side elevation showing tray height and feet clearance
Lifestyle angle showing the product in use
recommended_real_life_environments: Pooja altar or small religious corner
Office desk with stationery and keys
Festive decorated living room with diya and sweets
indian_lifestyle_settings: Diwali or Raksha Bandhan gifting scenario
Daily house routine with jewellery organization
Traditional meets modern festive table arrangement
Work from home desk with organized essentials
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Use natural daylight or soft studio lighting to enhance marble veins and reflective gold foot texture, ensuring true-to-life color rendering
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean white or neutral backgrounds with premium minimalism, balanced contrast, and emphasis on craftsmanship details for a sophisticated brand image

suitable_backgrounds: Pure white seamless backdrop for product-only visuals
Light wooden or marble textured surfaces for lifestyle shots
Subtle neutral tones like beige or light grey to avoid distraction
Festive themed backgrounds with soft warm hues (orange, gold)
Modern Indian home interiors with minimal décor
lifestyle_scenarios: Jewellery and accessories neatly placed on the tray in a dressing room
Keys, coins, and small household items organized on an entryway table

Office desk organizer with small stationery items
Gifting moment showcasing tray with decorative wrapping
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top or bottom corners with enough white space in lifestyle and studio shots for bullet points or logos without clutter; avoid product surface
what_must_be_avoided: Mismatched or overly bright colors overshadowing the product
Overexposure or harsh shadows hiding marble texture
Incorrect depiction of material gloss or gold tone
Including unrelated props that confuse use-cases
